record.field: Closing the books in five days, not twenty.
Replaced spreadsheet-driven consolidation with a unified Odoo deployment across four legal entities.

The Challenge

PT Maju Bersama, a mid-market manufacturer with four legal entities, was struggling with month-end close. Their finance team spent 20 days every month manually consolidating data from multiple spreadsheets, leading to delays in financial reporting and decision-making.

Our Approach

We implemented a unified Odoo ERP system across all four entities with:

  • Centralized chart of accounts with inter-company mapping
  • Automated consolidation rules for real-time reporting
  • Bank reconciliation automation for 3 major Indonesian banks
  • Custom dashboards for management visibility

The Results

Within 3 months of go-live, the finance team achieved:

  • Month-end close reduced from 20 days to 5 days
  • 75% faster financial reporting
  • Zero manual consolidation errors
  • Real-time visibility across all entities
Designed approval flows and bank reconciliation rules that eliminated repetitive accounting work.

The Challenge

A professional services firm with 50+ employees was drowning in manual data entry. Their accounting team spent most of their time on repetitive tasks instead of analysis and strategy.

Our Approach

We automated their entire financial workflow:

  • Smart bank reconciliation with auto-matching rules
  • Automated expense approval workflows
  • Invoice generation from timesheets
  • Recurring journal entries for fixed costs

The Results

  • 1,200 manual entries eliminated monthly
  • Accounting team capacity freed for analysis
  • 98% reduction in data entry errors
  • Real-time cash flow visibility
One source of truth across five platforms.
Connected storefront, payments, 3PL, CRM, and accounting through a single integration layer.

The Challenge

Retail Sukses Indonesia operated across 5 different platforms: Shopify storefront, Midtrans payments, a 3PL provider, separate CRM, and manual accounting in spreadsheets. Data silos caused inventory issues and customer service delays.

Our Approach

We built a unified Odoo system with custom integrations:

  • Real-time sync with Shopify orders and inventory
  • Midtrans payment reconciliation
  • 3PL fulfillment tracking integration
  • Unified customer data and history
  • Automated accounting entries

The Results

  • 5 systems unified into one platform
  • Inventory accuracy improved to 99.5%
  • Customer service response time cut by 60%
  • Complete order visibility from click to delivery
HR payroll for 200 employees in 15 minutes.
Automated complete HR and payroll process including BPJS, PPh 21, and bank transfers.

The Challenge

Teknologi Nusantara's HR team spent 2 full days processing payroll for 200+ employees. Manual calculations led to errors and employee complaints.

Our Approach

We implemented a complete HR and payroll automation:

  • Employee self-service portal for leave and expenses
  • Automated attendance tracking integration
  • PPh 21 calculation with TER method
  • BPJS Kesehatan & Ketenagakerjaan auto-calculation
  • Direct bank transfer file generation

The Results

  • Payroll processing reduced to 15 minutes
  • Zero calculation errors
  • 100% labor law compliance
  • Employee satisfaction increased
Unified inventory management across 8 retail locations with real-time stock visibility.

The Challenge

A retail chain with 8 locations struggled with inventory visibility. Stock-outs at one location while excess inventory sat at another was common.

Our Approach

We implemented unified inventory management:

  • Real-time inventory sync across all locations
  • Automated inter-warehouse transfer suggestions
  • Reorder point automation
  • Barcode scanning integration

The Results

  • Stock-out incidents reduced by 80%
  • Inventory carrying costs reduced by 25%
  • Real-time visibility across 8 locations
Connected GPS fleet tracking with fuel management, maintenance, and accounting systems.

The Challenge

A logistics company with 50+ vehicles had no visibility into fleet costs. Fuel theft was suspected, maintenance was reactive, and driver performance couldn't be measured.

Our Approach

We built an integrated fleet management solution:

  • GPS tracking integration with Odoo
  • Fuel consumption monitoring and alerts
  • Preventive maintenance scheduling
  • Driver performance scorecards
  • Cost allocation to jobs/customers

The Results

  • Fuel costs reduced by 18%
  • Maintenance downtime reduced by 40%
  • Full cost visibility per vehicle and job
